setting: the throne room of the Hollow, where reality bends around the spectral crown
stakes: The King reveals the truth of the corruption and the path forward

cinematicLines.speaker: hollow_king
cinematicLines.text: You have walked my Hollow. You have spoken with its guardians, its merchants, its priests. You have seen the cracks in my crown.

cinematicLines.speaker: hollow_king
cinematicLines.text: I did not fall to corruption. I sacrificed myself to contain it. The crown... the crown was never meant to rule. It was meant to imprison.

cinematicLines.speaker: hollow_king
cinematicLines.text: But the prison weakens. The corruption spreads beyond my domain -- to the Ashen Reaches, to the coast, to the very tide itself.

cinematicLines.speaker: hollow_king
cinematicLines.text: You carry something... different. Not corruption. Not purity. Something in between. Perhaps... something that can walk the path I could not.

cinematicLines.speaker: hollow_king
cinematicLines.text: The Ashen Gate awaits. Beyond it lies the forge that sealed this fate -- and the forge that may yet unmake it. Go. The Reaches will test you. But know this: the choice you make there... will echo beyond all our ends.
